title: Delhi State Cancer Institutes – Junior Residents – 16 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Delhi State Cancer Institutes Junior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: DSCI Junior Residents Recruitment 2026 announced for 16 ad-hoc posts. MBBS graduates with internship completion and Delhi Medical Council registration can attend the walk-in interview on 25 May 2026. Check eligibility, salary, selection process, and notification details at dsci.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from a recognized university. Must have completed one year internship not before 2 years as on date of interview and enrolled with Delhi Medical Council., The candidate must not have completed 01-year Junior Residency in any Govt hospital in India., FMGE Certificate for FMG candidates in eligibility qualification / required document list.
